title: Secretary Bessent: "Financial Literacy Unlocks Opportunity for Every American"
summary: The U.S. Treasury issued a press release recognizing National Financial Literacy Month, featuring remarks from Secretary Scott Bessent on the importance of financial literacy education. The release announces coordinated events and initiatives with federal agencies represented on the Financial Literacy and Education Commission (FLEC). The content is promotional/awareness material and contains no economic data, policy signals, or market-relevant information.
key_points: Treasury recognizes National Financial Literacy Month in April 2026
Secretary Bessent, as the 79th Treasury Secretary, provides a statement on financial literacy
Announcement references the Financial Literacy and Education Commission (FLEC) coordination
Content is promotional/awareness focused with no economic data or policy implications
why_it_matters: This press release has no direct relevance to market structure or macro catalysts. It is an educational outreach announcement with no impact on financial markets, monetary policy, or economic conditions.
